description.heading: Cargo Delivery Introduction
description.description: Complete your first delivery to get started.

description.heading: Standard Cargo & Small Trailers
description.description: Start delivering standard parcels and towing small trailers.

description.heading: Premium Cargo
description.description: Transport larger, heavier packages for higher rewards.

description.heading: Heavy-duty Trailers
description.description: Take on the challenge of delivering large trailers.

description.heading: Logistics Expert
description.description: All cargo types at your disposal. PlanEx Tier 2 packs unlocked.

description.heading: Professional Courier
description.description: PlanEx Tier 3 packs unlocked — premium cargo, higher risk, better pay.

description.heading: Expert Hauler
description.description: PlanEx Tier 4 packs unlocked — expert routes with serious payloads.

description.heading: Elite Dispatcher
description.description: PlanEx Tier 5 packs unlocked — the most demanding and lucrative deliveries.

description.heading: Logistics Legend
description.description: Maximum rank achieved. You are the ultimate delivery driver.
